title: Ordo Replacement Sonic Toothbrush Heads with Pulse Technology for Teeth Cleaning, Plaque Removal, Silicone Polishing, Deep Clean Bristles, Adults, Pack of 4, Black Charcoal Grey
features: Empower Your Smile: The Ordo Sonic+ Brush Heads are meticulously engineered for an optimal clean, setting it apart from generic electric toothbrush heads. Embrace the confidence that comes with impeccable oral hygiene, thanks to this product's high-quality bristles and comprehensive cleaning ability.

Harness Sonic Excellence: Discover the difference with Ordo's Sonic+ sonic toothbrush heads. Their individually rounded bristles, paired with a silicone polishing element, ensure a gentle yet profoundly effective clean, showcasing Ordo's commitment to blending style, quality, and function.

A Seamless Experience: Ordo toothbrush heads epitomise ease and elegance. With a simple click push fit, the Sonic+ ensures easy replacement, allowing you to continue experiencing the benefits of its unique design, slim profile, and gum-massaging capabilities.

Designed for the Discerning: Each pack contains 4 brush heads, underscoring Ordo's commitment to value and quality. Moreover, the durable design and ability to clean between teeth make it a smart investment for those seeking the best in sonic electric toothbrush head technology.

Optimal Oral Health: Dentists recommend replacing your brush head every two to three months. With the Ordo Sonic+ electric toothbrush heads, not only are you reminded of this best practice, but the transformation in your oral care routine is palpable. Remember to rinse before the first use and enjoy a radiant smile with every brush.
description: Product Description Brilliant Bristles After years of research and thousands of brush heads sold, our oral hygiene engineers have developed the ultimate brush head for all mouth types. Slim head for manoeuvrability, alternate bristles heights for a deeper clean and a silicone textured back to massage the inner surfaces of your gums. Easy Fit Our brush heads are easily interchangeable with a push-fit design, simply slide off with a pull and attach with a simple “click”! X Marks the spot Ordo's Sonic+ Brush head has a built-in silicone-polishing element designed to help whiten your teeth using a gentle polishing action. Use with Ordo's Complete Care Toothpaste for best results. What are the features of the Ordo Sonic Brush Head? Individually rounded bristles that are carefully designed to gently yet effectively clean each tooth. Equipped with a silicone polishing element for gentle teeth whitening. Slimline design with an easy-change mechanism. How does the silicone polishing element work in the Ordo Sonic Brush Head? The silicone polishing element is integrated into the brush head. As you brush your teeth, it helps to gently polish and whiten your teeth, giving you a brighter smile. What toothbrushes is the Sonic Brush Head compatible with? Our Sonic Brush Heads are compatible with our Sonic+ toothbrushes and our Sonic Lite toothbrushes. No confusing head types here, we keep it simple and easy. How can I replace the Sonic Brush Head on my Ordo toothbrush? Replacing the Sonic Brush Head on your Ordo toothbrush is a breeze. It's all thanks to the simple click push-fit design. Just pull to remove the old brush head, and click to attach the new one. How does the Sonic Brush Head help with gum health? The Sonic Brush Head is designed to provide thorough cleaning which contributes to overall oral health, including gums. The rounded bristles gently clean each tooth and which helps in maintaining healthy gums.
